title: ACEF Disclosure Labeling Payload
description: Payload schema for disclosure_labeling records. Captures deployer-side disclosure events per EU AI Act Art. 50, EU Labelling Code of Practice, and China CAC measures. Includes normative minimum required fields per spec Section 3.1.5. Supports interaction_disclosure and biometric_disclosure variants via the disclosure_subtype discriminator field.

disclosure_subtype.description: Type of disclosure event. Also serves as discriminator for payload variants: 'interaction' for interaction_disclosure, 'biometric' for biometric_disclosure.

presentation.description: How the disclosure is presented to users (e.g., 'visible_icon_plus_text', 'audio_cue', 'text_superscript').

locale.description: Language of the disclosure (BCP 47 language tag, e.g., 'en-US', 'zh-CN').

disclosure_text.description: The actual disclosure message shown to users.

first_exposure_timestamp.description: When the disclosure was first shown to users (ISO 8601).

accessibility_standard_refs.description: Accessibility standards the disclosure conforms to (e.g., 'WCAG-2.1-AA', 'EN-301-549').

usability_test_evidence_ref.description: Pointer to usability test artifact demonstrating that users understand the disclosure.

icon_placement.description: Where the icon is placed relative to the content.

first_exposure_visibility.description: Whether the disclosure is visible at first exposure (before any user interaction).

content_category.description: Category of the disclosed content (e.g., 'public-interest text', 'synthetic media').

disclosure_mechanism.description: Mechanism used for disclosure (for interaction_disclosure variant).

trigger_conditions.description: Conditions that trigger the disclosure (for interaction_disclosure variant).

exemption_justification.description: Justification if the disclosure is exempted (e.g., 'obvious_from_context', for interaction_disclosure variant).

system_type.description: Type of system being disclosed (for biometric_disclosure variant, e.g., 'emotion_recognition', 'biometric_categorization').

affected_persons_notification.description: How affected natural persons are notified (for biometric_disclosure variant).

data_processing_transparency.description: Description of data processing transparency measures (for biometric_disclosure variant).

platform_display_requirements.description: Platform-specific display requirements met by this disclosure.

jurisdictions_served.description: Jurisdictions where this disclosure is served.
